_meta.note: BDP corpus. Run a Chrome MCP probe against any real BDP page to fill in concrete measurements. SRP corpus is the template (../srp/structural.json).

_todo_sections.name: gallery
_todo_sections.note: Carousel of boat photos. Real BT uses real images; sandbox uses procedural SVG placeholders (Out-of-scope §3 in SCOPE.md). FIDELITY.md row 'BDP gallery 3:2 aspect' covers the existing match.

_todo_sections.name: badges
_todo_sections.note: Top-left tags: 'Saved', 'New to Market', 'Price Drop', etc. FIDELITY.md 'Days listed' row covers the 'Listed N days ago' badge.

_todo_sections.name: price_and_monthly
_todo_sections.note: Bold price + 'Est. $X/mo' link. Listing-card info icon + sticky-tooltip pattern is captured in FIDELITY.md (matched ✅).

_todo_sections.name: dealer_card
_todo_sections.note: Right-rail card with dealer name, location, contact form (Name/Email/Phone/Message).

_todo_sections.name: contact_form_fields
_todo_sections.note: Real BT uses 4px br inputs. FIDELITY.md row 'lead form inputs 4px radius, outline button 2px' covers the matched spec.

_todo_sections.name: show_phone_reveal
_todo_sections.note: Phone is hidden behind a 'Show phone' button. POST /boat/<slug>/show-phone is already wired + mutates Store.phone_revealed.

_todo_sections.name: owner_highlights
_todo_sections.note: Bullet list of key features (e.g. 'Twin Volvo Penta engines, low hours, fresh bottom paint').

_todo_sections.name: spec_grid
_todo_sections.note: Two-column key/value grid: Length, Year, Make, Model, Hull Material, Fuel Type, Engine, etc.

_todo_sections.name: propulsion_block
_todo_sections.note: Engine details: type, horsepower, hours, drive type.

_todo_sections.name: similar_boats_rail
_todo_sections.note: Card rail at bottom — same shape as SRP listing card.

_todo_sections.name: sticky_title_bar
_todo_sections.note: Appears on scroll past 320px. Holds title + price + 'Contact' CTA. Wired in base.html via .bdp-scrolled body class toggle.

_known_matches_in_fidelity_md: Lead form inputs 4px radius, outline button 2px (v=55)
_capture_methodology: Open any BDP (e.g. https://www.boattrader.com/boat/<slug>/) in Chrome MCP, scroll through each section to make it visible, then run the structural probe per section. Save measurements + style tokens here.
